title: Taiwan in the crosshairs - GZERO Media
summary: April 30, 2026. While the world has its eyes on the Strait of Hormuz, China's gaze remains fixed farther east: Taiwan. ... military exercises to disrupt trade.
contents:
## Source Context

OSINT collection from the @MNDChina Twitter/X account, focused on China PLA military exercises Taiwan strait, surfaces a recent news report linked below. The source @MNDChina consistently covers this beat and analysts often cross-reference outside reporting against the account.

> April 30, 2026. While the world has its eyes on the Strait of Hormuz, China's gaze remains fixed farther east: Taiwan. ... military exercises to disrupt trade.
